mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, email, phone, nickname, avatar, status, is_online, last_login_time, last_login_ip, created_at, updated_at FROM user ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, username, password, email, phone, nickname, avatar, status, is_online, last_login_time, last_login_ip, created_at, updated_at FROM user WHERE id = #{userId}
SELECT id, username, password, email, phone, nickname, avatar, status, is_online, last_login_time, last_login_ip, created_at, updated_at FROM user WHERE username = #{username}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (username, password, email, phone, nickname, avatar, status, is_online, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{nickname}, #{avatar}, 1, 0, NOW(), NOW())
